snippet.title: The Polygamist | Official Trailer (Joyce) | Netflix
snippet.description:
A glamorous matriarch's world shatters when her husbands secrets are exposed. Terrified of public ruin but too proud to be played for a fool, she must fight through her exhaustion to reclaim her self-worth before the truth destroys them both.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81687037

Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2SpsrJ1

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

https://www.twitter.com/netflixSA 
https://www.instagram.com/NetflixSA 
https://www.Facebook.com/NetflixSouthAfrica 
https://www.twitter.com/NetflixNaija 
https://www.instagram.com/NaijaOnNetflix 
https://www.facebook.com/netflixnaija

The Polygamist | Official Trailer (Joyce) | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@AfricaOnNetflix

Social media darling, Joyce, is the picture of marital perfection — until her cheating husband's conquests ignite a scandalous emotional meltdown.

snippet.title: 1000 Players Simulate UNDERGROUND Civilization in Minecraft
snippet.description:
kingdom of the caves

1000 Players Simulate UNDERGROUND Civilization in Minecraft

Unstable SMP:
➜  ⁨@FlameFragsMC 
➜  @Spokeishere 
➜  @ParrotX2 
➜  ⁨@wemmbumc 

minor spoilers below

featuring: @yungymc @JadenMAN @FlameFragsMC @saparata @ParrotX2 @TheobaldTheBird 

music from:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9UKPs9ZisfhMJdalnETLRg (tons of the music I use is by AZALI so check him out!) 
https://www.youtube.com/user/andreaszoellermusic
https://www.youtube.com/@Kalamity_Music

This is a Minecraft video recorded in the Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP that is staged for story-telling purposes; any more staged videos I upload will have a disclaimer in the description saying that they are also staged. Also, a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

music also from: official minecraft soundtrack, official elder scrolls soundtracks, official enderal soundtrack, epidemic sound (https://www.epidemicsound.com), storyblocks (https://www.storyblocks.com), artlist (https://artlist.io), soundstripe (https://www.soundstripe.com), fesliyan studios (https://www.fesliyanstudios.com/royalty-free-music), and envato (https://elements.envato.com/)

Enderal Soundtrack - Extended (HQ): Empire By The Sea https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9xwfR39ISwM by Simon Autenrieth, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): Fleshless - Fleischlos (piano version) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=badF7knDy8A by Sebastian Löbbers & Nicolas Lietzau, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Enderal Soundtrack - Extended (HQ): Arachnids https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-mgPLVPpYfI by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): Black Light - Schwarzes Licht https://youtu.be/h6QIAw0duF0 by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): Dust at the Horizon - Staub am Horizont https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UUEWgKm6WY0 by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Enderal Soundtrack - Extended (HQ): Every Day like the Last - Jeder Tag wie der Letzte https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=d6hMrK1T0Eg by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Enderal Soundtrack - Extended (HQ): Forgotten Dreams - Vergessene Träume https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5gGQ-AeRxpk by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): Glades - Lichtung https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vOO1Kz2EWdU by Simon Autenrieth, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Enderal Soundtrack - Extended (HQ) Götterdämmerung https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=F-1nB5AnNh0 by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Enderal Soundtrack - Extended (HQ): 1000 Miles - 1000 Meilen https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=e2xg52b5yPs by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): The Cleft - Der Schlund https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ifYTDVapuLs by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): Numinos https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qWwG7EIEFHU by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

snippet.title: Little Brother | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
Rudd (John Cena) has the perfect life – great job, loving family, and a thriving career as a real estate agent… until his little brother, Marcus (Eric Andre), crashes back into his world as a full-blown agent of chaos, stress-testing every part of Rudd’s carefully controlled existence.

snippet.title: Becoming a TELEPATH to Find My Friend’s SECRETS in Minecraft
snippet.description:
Reading My Friends' Minds in Minecraft! 🔮👀 What weird hobby is Milo hiding underground? Why does JipJip have a shrine to a Blaze? Will Chip be able to figure out the secrets being kept from him?
Just like Maizen and Cash!

✅ HOW TO PLAY MINECRAFT WITH CHIP AND MILO
1. Open Minecraft
2. Click "Play"
3. Click the "Servers" tab
4. Click "Add Server" 
5. Type in the IP: play.eyserver.com
6. Type in the Port: 19132
7. Click "Join"
You can join this server on Bedrock Edition (Phones, Consoles and Tablets) and Java Edition (PC and Mac)

#minecraft #minecraftbuild #miloandchip
tags: Becoming a TELEPATH to Find My Friend’s SECRETS in Minecraft
Reading my friends mind in Minecraft
Using mind reading to find my friends secrets in Minecraft

snippet.title: I Became A PROFESSIONAL DOCTOR.. (VR)
snippet.description:
Today I played as a VR Surgeon and it was hilarious! Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

Merch: https://foltyn.shop/

Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn
tags: i opened my own barbershop in vr

❤️ Tik Tok: https://www.tiktok.com/@firelight846mc?_t=8ZCYwB1CFKT&_r=1
📷 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/itsfirelight846/
🎮 My Minecraft Server Address: play.eyserver.com
You can join this server on Bedrock Edition (Phones, Consoles and Tablets) and Java Edition (PC and Mac)

💙 Huge thanks and credit to these awesome creators for inspiring today's video: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1_UilMRDHRNSZ3VyzxhW0fQ6_T5GfizFUlMGCI20vPGI/edit?usp=sharing
🎵 Music from: http://share.epidemicsound.com/wn87w

snippet.title: Unstable SMP: Civil War
snippet.description:
After I Became King of the Unstable SMP, the world split into two different sides: the new players, and the old ones. Soon enough, most of these players left my Kingdom and joined Cindercrest. And just like that... a Civil War had begun. 

Unstable SMP:
➜ ‪  ‪  ‪‪@FlameFragsMC 
➜     @wemmbumc 
➜     ‪‪@Spokeishere 
➜     @ParrotX2  

Like ParrotX2 and his Unstable SMP series, where he is escaping Paragon / Proton: Minecraft's Most Secure Prison, or got hunted by a Minecraft Player who doesn't exist. This is a new and original Minecraft idea like HermitCraft or Lifesteal with Wemmbu, FlameFrags, or Spoke. Survival is harder than Hardcore Minecraft because PVP is on.

Air Defense System and Arrow Orbital Cannon created by @cubicmetre 

Blimp design: https://youtu.be/IZTobBVAJ6U?si=ZxKF8R9OQSHcCu1y 

People in this video: @TheobaldTheBird @FlameFragsMC@saparata  @Lomedy @fymada @4CVIT @yungymc 

This is a video on the Unstable Universe: a staged Minecraft server where ParrotX2, Wemmbu, Spoke, and FlameFrags tell stories in Minecraft.

A Minecraft video made by Parrot or ParrotX2 on other platforms! Enjoy!
tags: Here's Why I Made 12240 Minecraft Cakes
